name: Savory Sauerkraut Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Sauerkraut, rinsed and thoroughly drained
4 cups Day-old white bread, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet.
2. Add celery, onions, and thyme. Cook over medium heat for 5 minutes until the onion and celery are tender.
3. Add sauerkraut and cook for an additional 5 minutes to blend flavors.
4. Stir in chicken broth and simmer for 10 minutes.
5. Toss the sauerkraut mixture with all remaining ingredients, ensuring the bread is completely coated and moistened.
6. If cooking the stuffing outside the bird, sprinkle an extra 1/2 cup of chicken broth on top and cover with foil.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
8. Uncover and bake another 15 minutes to brown.
Makes 8 cups, enough for 1 large turkey, 2 roasting chickens, a goose, or 2 ducks.
